name: doTransaction
summary: Dispatch a Sale transaction to the connected terminal.
description:
The single entry point for payment transactions. Returns immediately (Unit/void); the outcome is delivered asynchronously to the supplied TransactionListener.

Internally the SDK: (1) generates a UUIDv4 eventId and calls listener.onStarted(eventId); (2) binds to the MasterApp service and sends the request as a JSON Message (bundle key MASTERAPPREQUEST, what=1001); (3) waits up to timeoutSecs for a reply; (4) parses the response and routes to onSuccess or onFailure.

Only SALE is supported in v0.1.0. Calls are serialized on the SDK worker thread — only one transaction is in flight at a time.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Authorization amount in paise. Must be > 0. Example: 9900 = ₹99.00.

fields.name: billingRefNo
fields.description: Merchant-side unique reference (up to 20 chars recommended). Echoed on the response. Must be non-blank.

fields.name: invoiceNo
fields.description: Merchant invoice identifier. Must be non-blank. The terminal may assign its own invoiceNo on the response.

parameters.name: listener
parameters.description: Callback sink. Receives onStarted, onSuccess, or onFailure on the SDK worker thread.

returns.description: Returns immediately. All results arrive exclusively through the TransactionListener callbacks.

callbacks.name: onStarted
callbacks.trigger: Always fired before any I/O. Persist eventId for log correlation.

callbacks.name: onFailure
callbacks.trigger: Any failure mode — input validation, transport, timeout, or terminal decline.

errors.when: amount == 0, blank billingRefNo / invoiceNo, or unsupported transactionType.
MasterApp not installed, bind failed, service died, or RemoteException on send.
Terminal returned Response.ResponseCode != 0. detail = ResponseMsg; terminalResponseCode = the numeric code as string.
Malformed response JSON or unexpected runtime condition. Report to Pinelabs with eventId.
